top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE > (SELECT MAX(CRE) * 1.5 FROM Laboratory) -- Assuming abnormal if > 1.5x normal (best effort)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE IS NOT NULL 
  AND (l.CRE < (SELECT MIN(CRE) FROM Laboratory WHERE CRE IS NOT NULL) * 0.9 
       OR l.CRE > (SELECT MAX(CRE) FROM Laboratory WHERE CRE IS NOT NULL) * 1.1)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE > (SELECT MAX(CRE) * 1.5 FROM Laboratory) -- Assuming abnormal if > 1.5x normal (best effort)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE IS NOT NULL 
  AND (l.CRE < (SELECT MIN(CRE) FROM Laboratory WHERE CRE IS NOT NULL) * 0.9 
       OR l.CRE > (SELECT MAX(CRE) FROM Laboratory WHERE CRE IS NOT NULL) * 1.1)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE > 1.2 * (SELECT AVG(CRE) FROM Laboratory WHERE CRE IS NOT NULL) -- Using 1.2x average as abnormal threshold (best effort)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.CRE > (SELECT MAX(CRE) * 1.5 FROM Laboratory) -- Assuming abnormal if > 1.5x normal (best effort)
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 70;
